data.body:
## Description

**What**: Update project documentation (CLAUDE.md, relevant docs) to reflect the new doc-writer sub-agent.
**Why**: Ensures future agents and developers have accurate awareness of the doc-writer agent, its dispatch mechanism, and the /dso:update-docs skill.
**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md updates (named-agent table already handled by Story 9e22-2d3d — this covers architecture section, quick reference); any other docs that would become stale
- OUT: CLAUDE.md named-agent table (handled by Story 9e22-2d3d)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, project documentation accurately reflects the doc-writer agent's existence, dispatch mechanism, and the /dso:update-docs skill
  ← Satisfies: epic documentation update requirement
- When this story is complete, this story was dispatched to the dso:doc-writer agent (not generic implementation), serving as a live integration test of the sprint dispatch pipeline
  ← Satisfies: integration validation (adversarial review: dependency_gap)

Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.

## Source Prompt Spec
doc-writer-agent.md (repo root) is the authoritative source for the doc-writer agent. Reference it for tier-specific writing styles and conventions.
